ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Date and time the game is scheduled */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field where the game is played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visitor team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game in the format 'Home - Visitor' */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field or stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the field in terms of spectators */,
  "is_indoor" INTEGER /* Whether the field is indoor or outdoor */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., grass, turf, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Short description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the coach */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the league is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Short description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the player's profile picture */,
  "player_description" TEXT /* Short description of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal made by the player */,
  "shots_off_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots off goal made by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player, spectator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was posted */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement expires */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Whether the announcement is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectator_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectator */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the spectator attended the game */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time the spectator entered the stadium */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time the spectator exited the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectator_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectator_attendance_spectator_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectator_id") REFERENCES spectators ("spectator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectators" (
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectator */,
  "spectator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the spectator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the spectator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the spectator */,
  "spectator_description" TEXT /* Short description of the spectator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the tournament belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket (e.g., single elimination, round robin) */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number in the bracket */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_brackets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_brackets_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_brackets_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectator */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_spectator_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectator_id") REFERENCES spectators ("spectator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectator */,
  "rating_score" TEXT /* Rating score given by the spectator */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_spectator_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectator_id") REFERENCES spectators ("spectator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
